title: Fondant Cake Artist
description:
If you love beautiful cakes, clean finishes, and turning ideas into show-stopping centrepieces, you’ll feel at home here.

Celebrate with Cake SG is a custom cake and party styling studio known for polished designs, strong themes, and details that photograph beautifully. We don’t do mass production or generic cakes. Every project is bespoke — with a clear concept, colour story, and a high standard of execution. Quality matters here, and it shows.

As a cake decorator with us, you’ll be hands-on creating custom cakes for birthdays and milestone celebrations. You’ll work with buttercream, fondant, tiered cakes, textures, colour matching, and themed elements. This is a real production role — you’ll be trusted with actual orders, not sidelined or stuck observing. You’ll work alongside a team that values sharp edges, clean lines, good workflow, and getting things right the first time.

We’re looking for someone with cake decorating experience, a strong eye for detail, and steady hands. You should be reliable, organised, and comfortable working under time pressure. You’ll need to take feedback well and care about the small details that make a cake feel premium. Weekend work is part of the role — celebrations don’t wait.

In return, you’ll get exposure to high-end custom cakes and party styling, creative projects you can genuinely be proud of, and a studio environment where skill is respected and growth comes from doing real work. Your work will be seen, shared, and celebrated — not hidden in the background.

If you care about craft, creativity, and doing things properly, we’d love to hear from you.

postedCompany.description:
Here’s a practical, no-nonsense company description you can use in your careers page, job ads, or “About Us” content. I’ve pulled facts from your brand presence and public info:

Celebrate With Cake SG is a Singapore-based custom cake studio and party styling brand with deep roots in the local celebrations scene. Since around 2009, we’ve built a reputation for highly detailed, sharp-finished cakes that not only look striking on the table and in photos, but taste just as good as they look. We don’t just make cakes — we help shape celebrations, delivering themed dessert tables, curated party setups, and event styling that bring personal stories and milestones to life. Over the years we’ve grown from a boutique cake maker into a trusted creative partner for birthdays, family milestones, and bespoke celebrations, earning a strong following and a portfolio of projects that range from elegant fondant cakes to playful, Instagram-ready party environments. Our work blends disciplined craftsmanship with thoughtful design, focused on quality, precision, and memorable experiences for families and hosts.
postedCompany.name: CELEBRATE WITH CAKE

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
